page.title: Contact
page.subtitle: Send an inquiry to an admin and get a reply. Replies are notified to your registered email.
page.subject: Subject
page.body_placeholder: Details (reproduction steps, expected behavior, environment, etc.)
page.empty_desc: Send your first inquiry using the form on the left.
page.detail_pending: Awaiting an admin reply. We'll notify you by email once a reply is posted.
page.toast_rate_limited: You've reached the inquiry rate limit (10 per hour). Please try again later.
page.toast_submitted: Your inquiry has been received. We'll reply to your registered email.

billing.msg_error_cancelled: Card registration was cancelled or failed. {detail}
billing.msg_card_only: Card registered. Please start your subscription on the pricing page.

general.label: General inquiry
general.desc: General questions about using the service or your account

other.label: Other
